descriptions.golden: Automatically clicks Golden Cookies and Reindeer as soon as they appear. Reindeer only appear during seasonal events.
descriptions.wrath: Automatically clicks Wrath Cookies (red). May trigger negative grandmapocalypse effects.
descriptions.bigCookie: Continuously clicks the big cookie as fast as possible to accumulate cookies.
descriptions.wrinklers: Pops all Wrinklers once they have all reached their final stage, collecting their cookies.
descriptions.spell: Casts Force the Hand of Fate automatically when the Grimoire is fully charged. Shares magic with Conjure Baked Goods, so avoid enabling both at once.
descriptions.fortune: Clicks fortune messages in the news ticker to collect their reward.
descriptions.dragon: Automatically levels up the Krumblor dragon when resources allow.
descriptions.buy: Buys the most profitable building based on CPS/price ratio, including synergy bonuses.
descriptions.oneMind: Allows Auto Buy to purchase the 'One Mind' upgrade (Elder Covenant path). Use with caution.
descriptions.lumps: Harvests a sugar lump automatically once it is ripe, for a guaranteed gain.
descriptions.conjure: Casts Conjure Baked Goods whenever the Grimoire has enough magic, for extra cookies. Shares magic with Force the Hand of Fate, so avoid enabling both at once.
descriptions.luckyReserve: Keeps a cookie reserve (about 6000x your CPS) so Golden 'Lucky!' cookies pay their maximum. Auto Buy spends only the surplus.
descriptions.dragonSacrifice: Lets the dragon auto-level sacrifice 100 buildings per level to fully train Krumblor. Off by default; appears only while Dragon is on. Warning: Auto Buy will immediately rebuy the sacrificed buildings.
